summary: Plan-only remediation result for five open PR inventory items. No PR has complete merge preflight. Two security-shaped webhook/session-routing PRs are quarantined to central security handling, one narrow contributor PR has a concrete repair path, and the remaining broad or proof-failing feature/diagnostic PRs need maintainer judgment before repair or merge planning.

actions.reason: Webhook routing plus information-leak/abuse framing is security-sensitive enough for central OpenClaw security handling, scoped only to this PR.
Useful narrow contributor branch should be repaired against current main, then revalidated before any merge recommendation.
The change is broad feature work with failed proof and product/API-surface decisions; a narrow autonomous repair artifact would not be maintainer-safe from the hydrated evidence.
Session context leakage across chat threads is a sensitive-data/session-boundary concern for central OpenClaw security handling, scoped only to this PR.
The code may be narrow, but the required user-visible proof is failing; maintainer input is needed on whether to repair proof, ask author follow-up, or split a targeted follow-up job.

needs_human: #64064: broad Anthropic advisor-tool feature with failed proof and product/API-surface decisions.
#69346: embedded-runner diagnostic PR has failing Telegram/real-behavior proof; maintainer should decide repair vs author follow-up.
